items.name_en: The Oversized Panda🐼 Chanel Classic Flap is stunning. The eye-catching LOGO on the body makes it instantly recognizable as Chanel. ✅ Shoulder ✅ Handheld. It holds everything. The Classic Flap is versatile, understated, timeless, lightweight, and spacious. Perfect for daily commuting. I've tested it for you! A casual Classic Flap tote is practical as a mom bag or for school. Double C LOGO is classic and durable. Very spacious with an effortless, lazy vibe! 🧺 Handbag, pink lining is sweet yet cool. Top-tier value in Chanel vintage. Super spacious and lightweight~

items.name_en: In Stock 25C, The King of Bags, HOBO Denim Medium. This bag is surprisingly light and beautiful in person. Added four pockets 👝, giving the bag a lot of energy. The chain is chunky, but the bag feels light on the body. It's the kind of bag you just grab and go 😎. The body is lambskin, hardware is vintage, looks super textured!!! Huge capacity, fits large phones, sunglasses 🕶️, etc... It's not small at all. Highly recommended for daily use or posing for photos.

items.name_cn:
🌟Mini Size《White with Black》OHANEL🚩🚩🚩Kangpeng Basket Bag
Shining on the fashion stage, the Kangpeng Mimi basket bag is a stunning sight, attracting everyone's attention. Various classic colorways are timeless legends in the fashion world. Their collision on this handbag shows a simple yet powerful beauty. Kangpeng series' unique material gives the bag a soft touch and tough quality. Exquisite, cute, and practical. It can easily hold your phone, wallet, lipstick, and other small items while staying stylish. The handbag design makes you carry it with elegance and composure. Whether paired with casual jeans or a glamorous evening gown, it blends perfectly and adds to your overall look. Choosing the black and white Kangpeng mini basket bag means choosing a unique fashion attitude that makes you stand out.
Size: 20x16x7cm

items.name_cn:
💰 Shipped! Chane✨New Champagne Gold CF
Glistening and shiny🤩 Absolutely stunning! Classic silhouette + Champagne Gold. High-class! Different lighting shows different colors; every angle is beautiful. Special craftsmanship used; although it's lambskin, don't worry about scratches as this leather is very durable. Style is versatile, suitable for both casual and formal wear💃👄
Size 25cm,
Style No. 112 Silver Pearl Lambskin

items.name_cn:
💰. In Stock Chanel 24A Kelly
Size: 19*13*7cm
24A Kelly Burgundy, it's really cute to me. This season's most requested, another vintage fashion cycle bag. The 1997 Kelly returns with a chain this time, vintage yet stylish. The 'King of Bags' lives up to its name. Handheld or crossbody, it's all good. Very lightweight with a rich vintage taste, just right. It's a '23k Bag King' worthy of the title. The large size isn't too big; it fits an iPhone Pro but is a bit tight for the Max. Exquisite but not bulky. The interior capacity is sufficient for daily use. The more you look at it, the more you like it. Can't resist the girly heart. Comparison of the two sizes' appeal.
Style No. AS4416

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
💰. 25c Kelly Black Hardware
Size: 13*19*7cm
25c Spring/Summer, a new Kelly color is out. Not only clothes, but bags have great designs too. But I have to say, the bag is really amazing. It feels like my wallet can't hold it. As a design inspiration, Kelly is elegant yet gentle. The vintage replica has a strong French retro feel. I really love it!
Style No. AS4416

items.name_cn:
Chanel 24N Red Tweed Crossbody Bag
A touch of red for winter ❤️ Jennie's same ski series, I love this red crossbody so much, it's quite eye-catching 🤩 Material is soft wool felt, very light. The red is beautiful, the strap is adjustable for crossbody or shoulder, both look great~ Retro and festive red, super suitable for Christmas 🎄 and Chinese New Year 🧨 Must get one
(18×30×8cm)
